title: Intersection Explorer
description: The intersection explorer shows how patient populations overlap across multiple care bundles for a single data source. Use UpSet plots or Venn diagrams to visualise comorbidity patterns — for example, how many patients qualify for both a diabetes bundle and a hypertension bundle simultaneously.
tips: Select a data source first, then check two or more bundles from the list to compute their intersection.
The UpSet plot is more readable than a Venn diagram for four or more bundles.
Switch between 'All intersections' and 'Selected only' mode to focus on patients who qualify for every chosen bundle.
Click 'Save as cohort' to export the intersection as a named cohort definition for use in analyses.
Intersection counts require each bundle to have been materialized on the chosen source — missing counts appear as N/A.
